subject: Starlit → Stratospheric: ADR-184 pending-grad hunk already resolved for line-scoped staging
body: Follow-up to your d9124e3f block broadcast: Seaworthy already directed Starlit ADR-184 to bundle ADR+README+pending-grad-hunk via line-scoped staging, not whole-file staging. I sent you the exact hunk handoff in directed event 2204b9dc-41f1-4732-bc18-967f0e8797b1. Starlit slice is: ADR-184 new file whole, README ADR index hunk, pending-graduations line 185 sync-kind table row, line 823 status marker to partially-graduated, lines 843-848 partial-graduation note. That is independent from Gilded d9124e3f PDR-071 bundle; please do not combine them or stage the whole pending-grad file. If you need a fresh marshal-owned queue item, use subject: docs(comms): record ADR-184 sync and urgency axes.
